caption: A man wearing a light blue button-down shirt and a black headset with a microphone is speaking against a plain, light-colored wall. He is the only person visible. Throughout the sequence, he uses hand gestures to emphasize his points. He begins with his right hand raised and open, then moves it toward his chest, later clenching his right fist near his shoulder, and finally bringing his hand down toward the bottom of the frame. His facial expression remains focused as he speaks. The text "Ashish Raichur" is visible in the bottom left corner of each segment. The setting is minimalist, with no other objects or equipment visible besides the headset he is wearing.
